ref: A little while later some people standing there walked over to Peter and said, ‚ÄúWe know you are one of them. We can tell it because you talk like someone from Galilee.‚Äù
text: N…õ k…õl…õe de b…î…õ, ban…î n…õ g…õ be li kititi n…õ …îk…õl…õ n…õ ba t…în…î Petro av…õ kl…õ ba …ñ…î as…õ, ‚ÄúTutuutu w…î tsy…õ bal…õ …îmay…õ teli onu, alas…õ w…î ka…ñ…î …ñu…ñ…î n…õ kebu w…î akas…õ.‚Äù
translated: When he arrived at the house, they said to him, "The keys have been given to Simon Peter," and he said to him, "Take the keys." Truly I say to you, the kingdom of heaven is like what you bind on earth and loose in heaven.
